hero.headline: Modern Web Development, Built with Precision
hero.subheadline: I craft blazing-fast, visually stunning websites with transparent processes and rapid turnaround. Your vision, engineered with precision.

features.title: Services & Expertise
features.subtitle: Everything you need for a powerful digital presence
features.card1Desc: Elegant, personal websites that showcase your work and identity with refined aesthetics and seamless navigation.
features.card2Desc: Leveraging modern workflows and cutting-edge tooling for rapid delivery without compromising quality.
features.card3Desc: Intuitive interfaces with meticulous attention to detail, ensuring every interaction feels premium and purposeful.
features.card4Desc: Websites that look and perform flawlessly across all devices, from smartphones to ultra-wide monitors.
features.card5Desc: Built-in search engine optimization to help your site rank higher and reach the right audience.
features.card6Desc: Streamlined development process delivering polished results in record time without cutting corners.
features.card7Desc: Tailored admin panels and dashboards that give you full control over your content and data.
features.card8Desc: Built-in support for multiple languages to reach a global audience from day one.
features.step1Desc: We discuss your vision, goals, and requirements in detail.
features.step2Desc: I create mockups and prototypes for your approval.
features.step3Desc: Your site is built with clean, modern, and scalable code.
features.step4Desc: Final testing, deployment, and handover with full support.
features.whyDesc: We focus on delivering clean, fast, and modern websites that help your business grow. No unnecessary complexity — just results.
features.why1: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
features.why3: Modern tech stack for optimal performance

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Clear tiers designed to match your project scope
pricing.disclaimer: Prices are flexible and open to negotiation based on final project scope.
pricing.tier1Desc: Simple, elegant website with essential core features. Perfect for personal brands and small businesses.
pricing.tier2Desc: Enhanced website with more interactive features, custom animated buttons, and polished contact forms.
pricing.tier3Desc: Full-featured advanced website including multilingual setups, complex animations, and high-tier elements.

contact.title: Let's Build Something Great
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Reach out and let's discuss how we can bring your vision to life.
contact.success: Message sent successfully! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.responseNote: Typical response time is within 12 hours. For urgent inquiries, please reach out via email directly.

ctaSection.title: Ready to Start?
ctaSection.subtitle: Let's turn your ideas into a stunning reality.
